'''鈭歴-t-h-th''' ('''kasathethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wye|wye]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-t-h-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wye|wye]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-t-h-th
|-
! Lemma
| kasathethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisathethoko|thisathethoko]] || [[word:jisathethoko|jisathethoko]] || [[word:shisathethoko|shisathethoko]] || [[word:kisathethoko|kisathethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusathethoko|thuthusathethoko]] || [[word:jujusathethoko|jujusathethoko]] || [[word:shushusathethoko|shushusathethoko]] || [[word:kukusathethoko|kukusathethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusathethoko|thusathethoko]] || [[word:jusathethoko|jusathethoko]] || [[word:shusathethoko|shusathethoko]] || [[word:kusathethoko|kusathethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusathethoko|thusathethoko]] || [[word:jusathethoko|jusathethoko]] || [[word:shusathethoko|shusathethoko]] || [[word:kusathethoko|kusathethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesathethoko|thesathethoko]] || [[word:jesathethoko|jesathethoko]] || [[word:shesathethoko|shesathethoko]] || [[word:kesathethoko|kesathethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosathethoko|thothosathethoko]] || [[word:jojosathethoko|jojosathethoko]] || [[word:shoshosathethoko|shoshosathethoko]] || [[word:kokosathethoko|kokosathethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosathethoko|thosathethoko]] || [[word:josathethoko|josathethoko]] || [[word:shosathethoko|shosathethoko]] || [[word:kosathethoko|kosathethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosathethoko|thosathethoko]] || [[word:josathethoko|josathethoko]] || [[word:shosathethoko|shosathethoko]] || [[word:kosathethoko|kosathethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙sathethoko|th忙sathethoko]] || [[word:j忙sathethoko|j忙sathethoko]] || [[word:sh忙sathethoko|sh忙sathethoko]] || [[word:k忙sathethoko|k忙sathethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasathethoko|thathasathethoko]] || [[word:jajasathethoko|jajasathethoko]] || [[word:shashasathethoko|shashasathethoko]] || [[word:kakasathethoko|kakasathethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasathethoko|thasathethoko]] || [[word:jasathethoko|jasathethoko]] || [[word:shasathethoko|shasathethoko]] || [[word:kasathethoko|kasathethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasathethoko|thasathethoko]] || [[word:jasathethoko|jasathethoko]] || [[word:shasathethoko|shasathethoko]] || [[word:kasathethoko|kasathethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
